languages.text: "Полковник сказал, что ты знаешь что-то про нечеловеческие руины в глубине корней".
"The colonel said that you know something about the xenos ruins deep in the roots."
languages.original_text: "Полковник сказал, что ты знаешь что-то про нечеловеческие руины в глубине корней".

traits.locale_text: "The Colonel said that you know something about the inhuman ruins in the depths among the roots."
"The Colonel said that you know something about the inhuman ruins in the depths among the roots."
"The colonel said that you know something about the xenos ruins deep in the roots."
"The colonel said that you know something about the xenos ruins deep in the roots."
"The colonel said that you know something about the xenos ruins deep in the roots."

languages.text: “上校说过，你对那些藏在根系深处的异形遗迹有所了解。”
languages.original_text: "The colonel said that you know something about the xenos ruins deep in the roots."

traits.locale_text: “上校说过，你对那些藏在根系深处的异形遗迹有所了解。”

languages.text: "Albay, köklerin derinliklerindeki zeno harabeleri hakkında bir şeyler bildiğini söyledi."
languages.original_text: "The colonel said that you know something about the xenos ruins deep in the roots."

traits.locale_text: "Albay, köklerin derinliklerindeki zeno harabeleri hakkında bir şeyler bildiğini söyledi."

languages.text: « Le colonel m'a dit que vous connaissiez les ruines xénos qui se trouvent au cœur des racines. »
languages.original_text: "The colonel said that you know something about the xenos ruins deep in the roots."

traits.locale_text: « Le colonel m'a dit que vous connaissiez les ruines xénos qui se trouvent au cœur des racines. »

languages.text: «El coronel ha dicho que sabe algo sobre las ruinas xenos que hay entre las raíces».
languages.original_text: "The colonel said that you know something about the xenos ruins deep in the roots."

traits.locale_text: «El coronel ha dicho que sabe algo sobre las ruinas xenos que hay entre las raíces».

languages.text: "Der Colonel sagte, Ihr wisst etwas über die Xenosruinen tief in den Wurzeln."
languages.original_text: "The colonel said that you know something about the xenos ruins deep in the roots."

traits.locale_text: "Der Colonel sagte, Ihr wisst etwas über die Xenosruinen tief in den Wurzeln."

languages.text: 「大佐は、根の深いところにある異星人の遺跡について何か知っていると言っていました」
languages.original_text: "The colonel said that you know something about the xenos ruins deep in the roots."

traits.locale_text: 「大佐は、根の深いところにある異星人の遺跡について何か知っていると言っていました」
